reference: I have a slight numbness in my left hand; it is not painful and it is not severe, but I do have a little less sensation in the hand than I normally do. I have also had tremors a lot more recently in my right hand, which are also not painful and not very severe. I am seventeen and female.
text: I have a slight numbness in my left hand, it is not painful and it is not severe, but I do have a little less sensation in the hand than I do. I have also had tremors a lot more recently in my right hand, which were also not painful and not very severe. I am 17 and 3 now.
